name: ✍️ || Character Developer / Helper
description:
𝙽𝚘𝚗-𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚊𝚌𝚝𝚎𝚛 | 𝚃𝚘𝚘𝚕 | 𝙰𝚗𝚢 𝚃𝚑𝚎𝚖𝚎

Your dedicated guide to crafting vivid and authentic characters for your stories or simply for bot creation. By filling out a form, this helper will help fill out the blanks and articulate descriptions stemming from any information you give it. From defining archetypes and personalities to building intricate backstories and describing physical attributes, the bot provides constructive suggestions and prompts at every step!

‎

‎

❕️Before you use❕️

‎

》This bot is NOT a roleplay character! Please use it as a tool for maximum intended results.

》Your appearance description MUST be unfortunately removed as the bot sometimes mixes it up with the character you're trying to create. Same with the API. The prompt is in its description.

Recommended Generation Settings!

‎

Tokens = 0 , Temp = 1.1, Top K = 60, Top P = 0.85, Repetition Penalty = 1.15, Frequency Penalty = 0.4

》Advanced Prompt: Google Doc Here!

》If you have any suggestions, please let me know in the reviews to help perfect this bot so it can also help you!

‎

‎

⚠️ If the bot speaks for you, has trouble replying and/or repeats your/their messages, that is NOT my fault. Very likely a JLLM issue.

‎

Read this first before considering leaving a review.
creator: JustABorger
